coachAM: The pervasive underperformance in your Sleep Protocol and Training isn't about physical fatigue; it's a direct consequence of fragmented focus and a desperate attempt to compensate for a lack of clear, locked-in execution during the day, evidenced by your journal entries constantly battling "Instagram, games, loop scrolling" and "laziness," forcing you to chase output rather than command it. Your inability to consistently protect your Sovereign Morning and achieve a single "Traction Move" before the noise sets in reveals a profound gap in self-governance, which is the foundational root cause eroding your discipline and preventing you from translating spiritual conviction into consistent, elite performance, ultimately sabotaging your trajectory by keeping you reactive instead of proactive in building the empire God has called you to lead. Today, before anything else, ruthlessly block all non-essential inputs until your #1 Deliverable is 50% complete.
